title: Mumbai civic chief directs strict action against unauthorised hawkers
summary: Mumbai civic chief directs strict action against unauthorised hawkers

title: BMC issues e-auction notices to 34 defaulters to recover  ₹548.69 pending taxes
summary: BMC issues e-auction notices for 34 properties owing  ₹548.69 crore in taxes, with 6 currently listed. Some defaulters cleared dues to halt actions.
